HediffDef.Name: RareCultivationRealmBase
HediffDef.description: a special effect granted by rare cultivation realm.

HediffDef.label: Foundation(Above Standard)
HediffDef.description: a foundation formed with above standard quality, grant slight boost to the speed at which Cultivator improve.

HediffDef.label: Foundation(Superior)
HediffDef.description: a foundation formed with superior quality, grant moderate boost to the speed at which Cultivator improve.

HediffDef.label: Foundation(Perfection)
HediffDef.description: a foundation formed with perfected quality, grant significant boost to the speed at which Cultivator improve.

HediffDef.label: Cracked-Golden Core
HediffDef.description: golden Core form a slight crack, preparing to shatter into Nascent Soul

HediffDef.label: Patterned-Golden Core
HediffDef.description: a rare situation where one golden core form with a strange pattern on it, cultivator of with this phenomenon are equivalent to a Nascent Soul realm.

HediffDef.label: Dual-Nascent Soul
HediffDef.description: a rare situation where one form a twin Nascent Soul, they cultivate much faster than other, and have one extra lives.

HediffDef.label: Saint Touched
HediffDef.description: a rare situation where one gain enlightment from breaking through into the Transcendent realm and being able to perceive Saint Qi ahead of time, this individual is blessed by Heavenly Dao and capable of cultivating faster, while also having greater luck in Refinement and Alchemy.
